scripts.build:ts: npm run build --workspace @gozar/shared && npm run build --workspace @gozar/control-plane
scripts.typecheck:ts: npm run typecheck --workspace @gozar/shared && npm run build --workspace @gozar/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @gozar/control-plane
scripts.test:ts: npm run test --workspace @gozar/shared && npm run test --workspace @gozar/control-plane
